name: Ezequiel López-Rubio
title: Full Professor, Dept. of Computer Languages and Computer Science, University of Málaga
bio: Ezequiel López-Rubio is a Full Professor at the University of Málaga. His research interests include graph theory, machine learning, computer vision, and neural network architectures. He is the creator of the IsalGraph framework and the principal investigator of the ICAI research group.

name: Mario Pascual González
title: Dept. of Computer Languages and Computer Science, University of Málaga
bio: Mario Pascual González is a PhD student at the University of Málaga working on graph representation learning and the IsalGraph framework. His research focuses on leveraging instruction string encodings for deep learning applications in graph generation, classification, and comparison.
